TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING ALLYCE KIMERLING AUTHORITY VS. YVONNE JEFFERSON IN PRO PER 10:30 A.M. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. BY AGREEMENT WITH THE COURT, BOTH SIDES ENTER A STIPULATION JUDGMENT. TERMS RECORDED IN OPEN COURT. 10:31 A.M. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE A STIPULATED JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT YVONNE JEFFERSON FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT #1 SANTOS STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. THE LEASE IS DECLARED FORFEITED AND A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $1,428.00 IS DUE THROUGH 8/31/93 FOR PAST DUE RENT. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 12:00 NOON ON 8/31/93. DEFENDANT REPRESENTS THAT SHE IS THE ONLY ADULT OCCUPANT IN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE WHO CLAIMS A RIGHT TO POSSESSION AND THAT NO OTHER ADULTS RESIDE ON THE SUBJECT PREMISE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFFERSON, YVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1 SANTOS STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94134 $1,428.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,428.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY EVICTION THROUGH 12:00 NOON ON 8/31/93. DEFENDANT YVONNE JEFFERSON WARRANTS SHE IS THE ONLY ADULT OCCUPANT OF THE UNIT AT #1 SANTOS SAN FRANCISCO, CA.
